work_package_result.summary: Replaced the stale Active milestone heading with a current-milestone heading that displays the actual ACTIVE or QUALIFYING status, guarded by deterministic regression assertions.

passed: clean-worktree probe, just check, clean-worktree probe on implementation commit 9052db1
49 developer-tool tests, 2 Python adapter-host tests, Rust and TypeScript workspace checks
protocol generation and compatibility checks against origin/main
not_run: owner acceptance remains a milestone gate after the live demo

review.method: R1 self-review of the exact implementation diff and generated ACTIVE/QUALIFYING headings
findings_closed: The first focused invocation correctly rejected stale generated views; regeneration was moved before the suite and all 9 tests then passed

observability_changes: the generated milestone test plan exposes the selected milestone actual lifecycle status
known_limitations: This presentation correction does not change current-milestone selection or owner acceptance semantics
